channel.title: Bright Crescent Trading Co LLC
channel.description: Premium trading in appliances, crystal craft, and precision spare parts.

item.title: Home
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
BRIGHT CRESCENT TRADING EXPERIENCE

Bright Crescent Trading Co LLC

Premium Trading in Appliances, Crystal Craft, and Precision Spare Parts

Contact Us Explore Products

Core Divisions

Professional sourcing across appliances, crystal products, and spare parts.

Premium Appliances

Curated home and commercial appliances from trusted global manufacturers.

View Category

Crystal Products

Elegant crystal pieces inspired by international design and craftsmanship.

View Category

Appliances Spare Parts

Reliable AC, refrigerator, and washing-machine parts for technicians and businesses.

View Category

About Bright Crescent

A trusted trading partner with premium standards.

Bright Crescent Trading Co LLC serves retail and commercial clients across UAE with carefully selected appliances, elegant crystal products, and dependable spare parts solutions.

Partnership Opportunity

Need premium product sourcing support?

Connect with our team for product catalogs, pricing details, and partnership opportunities.

Get in Touch

Core Divisions

Professional sourcing across appliances, crystal products, and spare parts.

Premium Appliances

Curated home and commercial appliances from trusted global manufacturers.

View Category

Crystal Products

Elegant crystal pieces inspired by international design and craftsmanship.

View Category

Appliances Spare Parts

Reliable AC, refrigerator, and washing-machine parts for technicians and businesses.

View Category

About Bright Crescent

A trusted trading partner with premium standards.

Bright Crescent Trading Co LLC serves retail and commercial clients across UAE with carefully selected appliances, elegant crystal products, and dependable spare parts solutions.

Partnership Opportunity

Need premium product sourcing support?

Connect with our team for product catalogs, pricing details, and partnership opportunities.

Get in Touch

item.title: News
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Company Updates

News and market highlights from Bright Crescent.

Company · 2026-01-15

Bright Crescent Expands Premium Appliance Procurement Network

Our sourcing division now supports broader supply coverage for premium kitchen and lifestyle appliances across GCC markets.

Product · 2025-12-07

Crystal Collections for Hospitality and Luxury Interiors

We introduced curated crystal décor lines inspired by international exhibitions to support hotels, lounges, and high-end residences.

Operations · 2025-11-26

Faster Spare Parts Availability for Cooling Systems

Inventory optimization now improves turnaround for AC and refrigeration spare parts requested by technicians and facility teams.

Partnership · 2025-10-13

Strategic Vendor Alliances for Long-Term Quality Assurance

Bright Crescent reinforces quality checks and compliance standards through strategic partner evaluation and lifecycle testing.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:

Company Updates

News and market highlights from Bright Crescent.

Company · 2026-01-15

Bright Crescent Expands Premium Appliance Procurement Network

Our sourcing division now supports broader supply coverage for premium kitchen and lifestyle appliances across GCC markets.

Product · 2025-12-07

Crystal Collections for Hospitality and Luxury Interiors

We introduced curated crystal décor lines inspired by international exhibitions to support hotels, lounges, and high-end residences.

Operations · 2025-11-26

Faster Spare Parts Availability for Cooling Systems

Inventory optimization now improves turnaround for AC and refrigeration spare parts requested by technicians and facility teams.

Partnership · 2025-10-13

Strategic Vendor Alliances for Long-Term Quality Assurance

Bright Crescent reinforces quality checks and compliance standards through strategic partner evaluation and lifecycle testing.

"}, "elements": []}]}]}]

item.title: Appliances Products
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Appliances Portfolio

Premium appliances for modern residential and commercial needs.

Refrigeration · Germany

Elite Smart Refrigerator 520L

  • Multi-zone cooling
  • Energy-efficient inverter
  • Fingerprint-resistant steel

Cooking · Italy

Signature Convection Oven Pro

  • Dual convection
  • Steam-assist baking
  • Soft-close precision doors

Laundry · Japan

Premium Front-Load Washer

  • Silent-drive motor
  • Auto-dose detergent
  • Fabric care modes

Lifestyle · France

Built-in Wine Chiller

  • UV-protected glass
  • Dual temperature zones
  • Vibration-control system

Cleaning · Sweden

Platinum Dishwasher Series X

  • Low water usage
  • Crystal-safe cycle
  • Auto-dry technology

Air Care · UAE

Modular Air Purification Tower

  • HEPA H14 filtration
  • Smart sensors
  • Large-space coverage

item.title: Crystal Products
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Crystal Selection

Refined crystal collections inspired by yitaicrystal-style categories.

Home Accessories

Aurora Crystal Vase

Lead-free crystal

Inspired by contemporary Asian crystal craft trends.

Gift Customization

Celestial Gift Figurine

Hand-cut optical crystal

Ideal for executive gifting and premium commemoratives.

Lighting Fixture

Lumen Hanging Accent

Polished faceted crystal

Decorative suspended crystal format for interiors.

Collection

Regal Crystal Bowl

Molded artisan crystal

Designed for premium tabletop presentation.

Home Accessories

Imperial Decorative Orb

K9 optical crystal

Statement centerpiece with high clarity and depth.

Gift Customization

Signature Trophy Form

Precision-engraved crystal

Corporate and ceremonial recognition piece.

item.title: Appliances Spare Parts
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Cooling & Appliance Components

Precision spare parts catalog inspired by leading UAE HVAC suppliers.

Spare Parts Catalog

Download full catalog PDF (final file link will be added by your team).

Download Catalog

Air Conditioning

AC Duct

Air Conditioning

Cooling Coil

HVAC

Fridge Compressor

Refrigeration

Fridge Timer

Refrigeration

Fridge Thermostat

Refrigeration

Washing Machine Pulsator

Laundry

Washing Machine Hub

Laundry

Washing Machine Gear

Laundry

Condenser Fan Motor

HVAC
